source.section: 2.9 - AGM-88C HARM Anti-Radiation Missile > 2.9.3 - AGM-88C HARM (PB) > 2 - Weapon Preparation

steps.action: Designate a point where the radar emitter is expected to be. This can be done with a Waypoint Designate (WPDSG) or any other method of designation (with a Targeting Pod for instance).
steps.voiced: Designate the expected emitter location via WPDSG or targeting pod.

steps.action: In our case, we will designate Waypoint 2 as the expected target location. Go to the HSI (Horizontal Situation Indicator) page, select Waypoint 2 with the selector arrows, then press OSB next to WPDSG.
steps.voiced: On the HSI page, select the target waypoint, then press the OSB next to WPDSG.
Set Master Arm switch to ARM.

steps.action: In SMS (Stores Management System) page, click on the OSB next to HARM to select it
steps.voiced: On the SMS page, press the OSB next to HARM to select it.

steps.action: Select desired Pull-Up mode A/C (Aircraft Pull-Up): Aircraft pulls up and lofts the missile towards the selected target point.
steps.voiced: Select Pull-Up mode A/C — aircraft pulls up and lofts toward target.

steps.action: Determine Target Code with the Target Codes Table listed in the Introduction section. We expect to attack a SA-8, so the code will be « 117 ».
steps.voiced: Determine the target emitter code from the Target Codes Table.

steps.action: Enter the Target Code with the UFC. Press OSB next to « UFC » (Up-Front Controller), then press OSB next to TGT (displays « : » when selected), type « 117 » on the scratchpad, then press ENT button to enter the target code.
steps.voiced: Press OSB next to UFC, press TGT, enter the target code on the scratchpad, then press ENT.
